articles.title: Xbox CEO Gives A Good Explanation For Why A Console Now Costs $800 - Forbes
articles.description: Xbox prices have skyrocketed, but there's a reason for that which is out of Microsoft's control, as the brand's new CEO explains.

articles.title: The Legend of Heroes: Trails from Zero - Gematsu
How To Unlock Destiny 2’s Two Secret, Final Endings - Forbes
articles.description: Destiny 2 may be ending abruptly, but Bungie has put in two secret endings that you'll have to work to see. And they are worth seeing.

articles.title: Five things I like (and one thing I still want) in the macOS 27 Golden Gate beta - Ars Technica
articles.description: AI aside, Golden Gate includes a bunch of subtle-but-helpful improvements.

articles.title: iFixit Trump phone teardown confirms it’s an HTC dupe - The Verge
articles.description: The Trump Mobile T1 Phone’s internals are almost identical to the ‘made in China’ HTC U24 Pro’s, iFixit has confirmed.
